narrative:
Precinct Portsmouth 2-C (precinct in Scioto County) has 373 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.9%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.6 percentage points.
